title: tecoma radicans var. atropurpurea
intro: Tecoma radicans var. atropurpurea, also known as the Purple Trumpet Vine, is a flowering evergreen vine native to the southeastern United States and Mexico. Its medicinal properties include its ability to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant's health benefits include its potential to reduce stress and anxiety, as well as its antioxidant properties that may help protect against cell damage. Tecoma radicans var. atropurpurea can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
